verdict: A solid Easy chart with great rhythmic connection, but suffers from steep difficulty spikes with fast 8th notes and excessive jumps for the difficulty level.

issues.problem: Too many jumps (DR, LR, LU, LR, LU) in quick succession. For an Easy chart at 195 BPM, this density of jumps is too exhausting and complex for beginners.
8th-note steps at ~195 BPM (154ms interval) are too fast for an Easy chart. These should be simplified to quarter notes to maintain accessibility.
An awkward flow sequence where a Hold L is immediately followed by D, U, and R taps, forcing either a turn or a double-step right after the hold release.
